trans-unit.source: An error occurred during login. Most likely you didn't enter the username or password correctly. Make sure you have entered both correctly, including upper/lower case. Another possibility is that cookies might be disabled in your web browser.

Hello, We have received a request to reset your password. Please click the following link:
%s
For security reasons, this link will only be active until %s. If you do not click the link before then, you will need to repeat the password reset steps. If you did not request to reset your password, you can ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.

Hello, We have received a request to reset your password. Please click the following link: %s
For security reasons, this link will only be active until %s. If you do not click the link before then, you will need to repeat the password reset steps. If you did not request to reset your password, you can ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
